mapper.insert: INSERT INTO teacher (name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{title}, #{phone}, #{email}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT id, name, gender, age, title, phone, email, create_time, update_time FROM teacher WHERE title = #{title}

SELECT DISTINCT t.id, t.name, t.gender, t.age, t.title, t.phone, t.email, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN college_teacher ct ON t.id = ct.teacher_id
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND ct.college_id = #{collegeId}
ORDER BY t.id ASC
